Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetDepthBias method configures depth bias to offset generated depth values.

Note.Paragraph: A non-zero clamp value requires the DepthBiasClamp feature to be supported and enabled on the renderer.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void SetDepthBias(float constantFactor, float slopeFactor, float clamp = 0.0f);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The constant depth bias value applied to generated depth values.
The scale factor applied to the maximum depth slope of each primitive.
The optional maximum absolute bias value. Use 0.0f to leave the bias unclamped.
